title: governance.role_assignment_* event payload (v1)
description: docs/canonical/TZ-00-domain-event-canon.md, section 20.15. Produced by epd2_governance_service.events.role_assignment_public_payload, shared verbatim by three distinct event_type builders: build_role_assignment_requested_event (governance.role_assignment_requested), build_role_assignment_activated_event (governance.role_assignment_activated), build_role_assignment_revoked_event (governance.role_assignment_revoked) - verified by reading events.py, all three call the shared payload function and differ only in event_type. Deliberately omits actor_id and assigned_by entirely (canon 19b.1: a RoleAssignment is internal authority-plumbing; no external event payload reveals which actor holds which role).
